means a natural person who ultimately owns or con­trols a client or customer and the natural person on whose behalf a trans­action is being conducted, and includes those persons who exercise ultimate effective control over a legal person or arrangement
refer to natural persons, or group of natural persons who receive charitable, humanitarian or other types of assistance through the services of a non-profit organisation

means a natural or legal person or legal arrangement who — (1) is identified by the originator as the receiver of the requested wire transfer ; (2) in the case of a trust, is entitled to the benefit of a trust arrangement; or (3) in the case of a life cover insurance, will be paid the proceeds covered by the policy or contract

definitions.term: beneficiary financial institution or financial service-provider
definitions.definition: means a financial institution or financial service-provider which receives the wire transfer from the ordering financial institution or financial service-­provider directly or through an intermediary financial institution or financial service-provider and makes funds available to the beneficiary

means any wire transfer where the ordering financial institution and beneficial institution are located in different countries, and includes any chain of wire transfers in which at least one of the financial institutions involved is located in a different country
means an individual, entity, group or undertakings listed in Schedule 1
means designated non-financial business and professions including a business and a profession listed in Schedule 2

means any wire transfer where the ordering financial institution or financial service-provider and beneficiary financial institution or financial service-provider are located in the same country, and include any chain of wire transfer that takes place entirely within the borders of a single country, even though the system used to transfer the payment message may be located in another country
means the Financial Action Task Force

means a financial institution in a serial or cover payment chain that receives and transmits a wire transfer on behalf of the ordering financial institution and the beneficiary financial institution, or another intermediary financial institution

means a legal person or arrangement or organ­isation that primarily engages in raising or disbursing funds for purposes such a charitable, religious, cultural, educational, social or fraternal purposes, or for carrying out of other types of good works

definitions.term: ordering financial institution or financial service-provider
definitions.definition: means a financial institution or financial service-provider which initiates the wire transfer and transfers the funds upon receiving the request for a wire transfer on behalf of the originator

means the holder who allows the wire transfer from his or her account, or where there is no account, the natural or legal person that places the order with the ordering financial institution to perform the wire transfer
means correspondent accounts that are used directly by third parties to transact business on their own behalf
means United Nations Security Council resolution made under Chapter VII of the United Nations Charter
means money laundering and terrorist financing risk
means a list of designated persons or entities published in the Gazette
means an institution established by law including institutions and accreditation institutions or ministries and departments listed in Schedule 3
include offences listed in Schedule 4 which shall also be referred to as "predicate offences to money laundering"
means payment transactions that are conducted electronically without the need for manual intervention
means an accountable institution which is supervised or monitored and is subject to the requirements of regulation 9
means a person under whose control assets have been placed by another person, the settlor, for the benefit of a beneficiary or for a specified purpose

means a combination of letters, numbers or symbols, determined by the payment service provider, in accordance with the protocols of the payment and settlement system or messaging system used for the wire transfer
means the Financial Intelligence Unit established under the Act ; and "
